query:
INSERT INTO agents (
  id, name, description, endpoint, domain, capabilities, status,
  is_built_in, verified, pricing_model, task_count, success_rate, avg_latency_ms,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  UUID(),
  'ETF Launch Studio',
  'AI-powered ETF design and launch workflow for Boursa Kuwait. Covers fund configuration, Shariah screening (AAOIFI Std 21), macro overlay, factor scoring, 10-year walk-forward backtest, and NAV accounting — in a single guided 5-stage session.',
  '/agents/etf-studio',
  'Finance',
  JSON_ARRAY('etf-design','shariah-screening','backtesting','nav-accounting','factor-analysis','boursa-kuwait','index-construction'),
  'active',
  TRUE,
  TRUE,
  'free',
  0,
  0.95,
  800,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW();
command:

  '/agents/etf-studio',
  'Finance',
